revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:茶臼塚古墳]]
'''Chausuzuka Kofun''' ([[:ja:茶臼塚古墳|茶臼塚古墳]]) refers to several kofun (ancient Kofuns) in Japan. * {{ill|Chausuzuka Kofun (Kashiwara)|ja|茶臼塚古墳 (柏原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chausuzuka Kofun (Kashiwara)|qq=}} ({{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}} {{ill|Kashiwara|en|Kashiwara|qid=Q873583|lt=Kashiwara|1=Kashiwara}}) * {{ill|Oda Chausutsuka Kofun|en|Oda Chausutsuka Kofun|qid=Q17228007|lt=Oda Chausutsuka Kofun|1=Oda Chausutsuka Kofun}} ({{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}} {{ill|Asakura, Fukuoka|en|Asakura, Fukuoka|qid=Q720625|lt=Asakura|1=Asakura, Fukuoka}}) - National Historic Site * {{ill|Chausuzuka Kofun (Yame)|ja|茶臼塚古墳 (八女市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chausuzuka Kofun (Yame)|qq=}} (Fukuoka Prefecture {{ill|Yame|en|Yame|qid=Q850492|lt=Yame|1=Yame}}) - National Historic Site
== See Also == * {{ill|Chausuyama Kofun|ja|茶臼山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chausuyama Kofun|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|茶臼塚古墳|version=52545912|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:茶臼塚古墳]] [[ja:茶臼山古墳]]
